name: Tiramisu Torte 2 of 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Place one piece of cake on a serving plate.
2. In a medium bowl, stir together powdered sugar.
3. In another medium bowl, stir together sugar, mascarpone cheese (or cream cheese), and vanilla.
4. Add 2 ounces grated chocolate to the mixture and stir.
5. Spread half of the filling on top of the cake on the serving plate.
6. Repeat layering with a second piece of cake and continue with another layer of filling.
7. Top with a third piece of cake.
8. In a chilled large mixing bowl, beat chilled whipping cream at high speed until soft peaks form (1 to 2 minutes).
9. Continue beating, gradually adding 2 tablespoons syrup until stiff peaks form (2 to 3 minutes).
10. Spread one cup whipped cream on top of the cake.
11. Sprinkle with remaining grated chocolate.
12. Pipe or spread the remaining whipped cream along the side of the cake.
13. Garnish with chocolate-covered coffee beans.
14. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours.
15. To serve, cut the torte into 8 slices and then cut each slice in half.
16. Store refrigerated. Yield: 16 servings.
